data.body: The interactive session watchdog in src/lib/agent-session-runtime-helpers.ts:285-290 fires after 10 minutes of silence and calls terminateProcessGroup(child) with ZERO logging. When it fires, we have no way to tell from logs that a timeout occurred — the symptom is a silent child_close with code=0, identical to a graceful exit. This is the root cause of knot foolery-557d iteration 3 abruptly ending after ~10 min of Codex silence (logs at .foolery-logs/_server/2026-04-17/console.log around 07:34:09). Must emit both a console.warn and a structured lifecycle event BEFORE calling terminateProcessGroup, including timeoutMs, msSinceLastEvent (Date.now() - state.lastNormalizedEventAt or similar), and lastEventType from state.lastNormalizedEvent.type.
data.title: Log watchdog firing before SIGTERM
